title: Dataset for "Monkeyflower (Mimulus) uncovers the evolutionary basis of the eukaryote telomere sequence variation"
author: Choi, Jae Young
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Dataset used for manuscript "Transposition, duplication, and divergence of the telomerase RNA underlies the evolution of Mimulus telomeres".  Final_TR_combined_aligned_CORE_12052023.fas   Multi-sequence alignment of the TR sequences that were analyzed in this study.      RAxML_bipartitions.newick   Phylogenetic tree of the TR multisequence alignment with bootstrap support after 1,000 replicates.      RAxML_bestTree.newick   The best fitting maximum-likelihood tree for the TR multisequence alignment
steps_raw: Dataset used for manuscript "Transposition, duplication, and divergence of the telomerase RNA underlies the evolution of Mimulus telomeres".
